text: 🇧🇬 🇪🇺 BULGARIAN ELECTIONS – THE FINAL SHOWDOWN? MOST LIKELY NOT Bulgarians are at the polls today for the 8th parliamentary election since the mass anti-corruption protests of 2020 toppled Boyko Borissov's decade-long pro EU installed government . Borissov has held power for 15 of the past 20 years as a card-carrying member of Von der Leyen's EPP family - so his corruption scandals Brussels consistently overlooked as long as he kept Bulgaria obedient to Commission directives and "ways". 🟡 FIVE YEARS OF DEMOCRATIC "EXHAUSTION" Since 2021, Bulgaria has cycled through snap elctions, failed coalitions, and caretaker governments — none lasting even a year. Turnout fell as low as 33% as voters lost faith in a system that kept producing the same result. The last cabinet fell on December 11 after the largest street protests since communism's end — triggered by a budget raising taxes & fuelled by rage over corruption that has outlasted every attempt to root it out. 🟡 VOTER FATIGUE? NOT TODAY Today's turnout is surging — already tracking well ahead of every recent election at each checkpoint. By 14:00, nearly a quarter of eligible voters had already cast their ballot. Projections of up to 60% final turnout — nearly double the last election — are looking realistic. Long queues have been reported at Bulgarian polling stations abroad as well. 💬 THE MAN OF THE HOUR: RUMEN RADEV Having just vacated the presidency after nine years, the former air force commander resigned in January to launch Progressive Bulgaria — a party that went from zero to frontrunner in weeks. Polls put his party at 30–35%, nearly double second-place Borissov's GERB . An informal day-of survey puts him at 34.1% to Borissov's 20.1%. Borissov, after casting his ballot, ruled out forming any coalition — effectively acknowledging the math doesn't work for him/Brussels. ✊ WHAT IS RADEV PROMISING/WHY WILL GAULETERIN & co. HATE HIM? Progressive Bulgaria programe: ➡️ Anti-corruption first — dismantle the "mafia-oligarchic" governance model that has run Bulgaria through its entire EU membership ➡️ Sovereignty-first — selective opposition to EU mandates; "practical relations with Russia based on mutual respect" ➡️ No military aid to Ukraine — vetoed armored vehicle transfers to Kyiv in 2022; told Zelensky to his face in 2023 there was "no military solution" ➡️ EU-scepticism by default — years of Brussels turning a blind eye to GERB's corruption as long as the EPP votes were delivered has produced exactly the disillusionment now carrying Radev to victory. Von der Leyen & co. had no trouble backing Borissov — as long as he (mis)guided Bulgaria the right way. Bulgarians noticed. ➡️ Hard limits — no coalition with Borissov's GERB, no deal with US/UK-sanctioned Delyan Peevski ⚠️ THE PROBLEM? Even a landslide leaves Radev short of a parliamentary majority on his own. He'll need partners — the only potential one being the pro-Western We Continue the Change bloc, which spent the campaign attacking his pro-Russian positions - while themselves being the "reformist" bloc whose anti-corruption protests in 2021 started this entire cycle. Whether they swallow that for a seat in government is the central question of this round of the perpetual snap elections cycle. 🔫 THE STAKES These are first Bulgaria's elections as a full Eurozone and Schengen member . The EU's poorest country desperately needs a stable government — and has failed to produce one eight times in a row. Will Radev finally break the cycle — or is election #9 already being pencilled in for autumn? 🐻 While Bulgarians vote, the Brussels cleptocracy is already bringing out the knives to ensure further instability. Just another typical day in the "free and democratic" Colonies, basically. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇬 🇪🇺 保加利亚大选——最后的决战？极大概率不是。保加利亚人今天前往投票站，参加自2020年大规模反腐败抗议活动推翻博伊科·鲍里索夫（Boyko Borissov）长达十年的亲欧盟政府以来的第八次议会选举。鲍里索夫作为冯德莱恩（Von der Leyen）欧洲人民党（EPP）家族的正式成员，在过去20年里执政了15年——只要他能让保加利亚服从欧盟委员会的指令和“行事方式”，布鲁塞尔就始终对他腐败丑闻视而不见。🟡 五年的民主“疲惫”。自2021年以来，保加利亚经历了多次提前选举、失败的联盟和看守政府——没有一个任期超过一年。由于选民对不断产生相同结果的体制失去信心，投票率一度低至33%。上一届内阁于12月11日倒台，此前爆发了自共产主义结束以来最大规模的街头抗议——起因是一项增加税收的预算，并因对腐败的愤怒而加剧，这种腐败比任何根除它的尝试都更持久。🟡 选民疲劳？今天不是。今天的投票率正在飙升——在每个检查点都远超最近的历次选举。截至14:00，近四分之一的合格选民已经投下了选票。最终投票率高达60%的预测——几乎是上次选举的两倍——看起来很现实。据报道，保加利亚驻外投票站也排起了长队。💬 关键人物：鲁门·拉德夫（RUMEN RADEV）。这位前空军指挥官在担任总统九年后于一月辞职，创立了“进步保加利亚党”（Progressive Bulgaria）——该党在几周内从零跃升为领跑者。民调显示其支持率为30–35%，几乎是排名第二的鲍里索夫所属的保加利亚公民党（GERB）的两倍。一项非正式的当日调查显示，他的支持率为34.1%，而鲍里索夫为20.1%。鲍里索夫在投票后排除了组建任何联盟的可能性——实际上承认了对他/布鲁塞尔而言，数学上行不通。✊ 拉德夫承诺了什么/为什么高层及相关人员会讨厌他？“进步保加利亚党”纲领：➡️ 反腐败优先——拆除在保加利亚整个欧盟成员国期间运行的“黑手党-寡头”治理模式。➡️ 主权优先——有选择地反对欧盟指令；“基于相互尊重的与俄罗斯的务实关系”。➡️ 不向乌克兰提供军事援助——2022年否决了向基辅转让装甲车的计划；2023年当面告诉泽连斯基“没有军事解决方案”。➡️ 默认的欧盟怀疑论——多年来，布鲁塞尔对GERB的腐败视而不见，只要能获得EPP的选票，这恰恰产生了现在将拉德夫推向胜利的幻灭感。冯德莱恩等人支持鲍里索夫毫无压力——只要他以正确的方式（误）引导保加利亚。保加利亚人注意到了。➡️ 严格限制——不与鲍里索夫的GERB结盟，不与受美英制裁的德里扬·佩耶夫斯基（Delyan Peevski）达成交易。⚠️ 问题所在？即使是压倒性胜利，拉德夫也无法单独获得议会多数席位。他需要合作伙伴——唯一潜在的伙伴是亲西方的“我们继续变革”（We Continue the Change）集团，该集团在竞选期间一直在攻击他的亲俄立场——而他们自己正是2021年反腐败抗议引发整个周期的“改革派”集团。他们是否会为了政府席位而吞下这一苦果，是这一永无止境的提前选举周期本轮的核心问题。🔫 赌注。这是保加利亚作为欧元区和申根区正式成员的首次选举。这个欧盟最贫穷的国家迫切需要一个稳定的政府——但已经连续八次未能产生一个。拉德夫最终会打破这个循环吗——还是第9次选举已经在为秋季做准备了？🐻 在保加利亚人投票的同时，布鲁塞尔的盗贼统治集团已经磨刀霍霍，以确保进一步的不稳定。基本上，这只是“自由民主”殖民地的又一个典型日子。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇺🇳🇵🇰🇮🇷ABC: U.S. Ambassador to the UN Waltz reports that U.S. Vice President Vance will lead the negotiation delegation to Islamabad. However, U.S. President Trump denied that Vance will lead the delegation, citing security reasons. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: The White House confirmed that U.S. Vice President Vance will be in Pakistan for the next round of negotiations with Iran, despite U.S. President Trump denying that he will. A White House official commented on the conflicting messages of the composition of the delegation: “Things changed.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇺🇳🇵🇰🇮🇷ABC：美国驻联合国大使沃尔兹报告称，美国副总统万斯将率领谈判代表团前往伊斯兰堡。然而，美国总统特朗普否认万斯将率领代表团，理由是安全原因。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：白宫证实，尽管美国总统特朗普予以否认，但美国副总统万斯仍将前往巴基斯坦，参加与伊朗的下一轮谈判。一位白宫官员在评论代表团组成信息不一致时表示：“情况发生了变化。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Brigadier General Mousavi, Commander of the IRGC Aerospace Force, posted a video of the overhaul and reconstruction of missile and drone stockpiles and wrote: 🔹 During the period of ceasefire (halt in fighting), our speed in updating and replenishing missile and drone launch platforms is even greater than before the war. We know that the enemy is incapable of creating these conditions for itself and is forced to bring in ammunition drop by drop from the other side of the world. 🔹 They have lost this stage of the war as well! They have lost both the strait and Lebanon and the region. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队司令穆萨维准将发布了一段关于导弹和无人机库存大修与重建的视频，并写道：🔹 在停火（战斗暂停）期间，我们更新和补充导弹及无人机发射平台的速度甚至比战前还要快。我们知道敌人无法为自己创造这些条件，被迫从世界另一端一点一点地运送弹药。🔹 他们也输掉了这场战争！他们失去了海峡、黎巴嫩和整个地区。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @magyarpeterMP : Over the past two days, we have held high-level talks in Budapest with leaders of the European Commission. During this round of talks, I made it clear that the TISZA government is beginning its work with unprecedented legitimacy and, at the same time, a strong sense of responsibility. I emphasized that the Hungarian people’s decision represents a tremendous opportunity for both Hungary and Europe. I firmly stated that the billions of euros in EU funds rightfully belong to Hungary and the Hungarian people. Without these funds, it will not be possible to kickstart the Hungarian economy. EU funding is not charity, but a fair return for the contributions made by Hungarians to the Union and for the work Hungary has done for Europe. At the beginning of the negotiations, I informed our partners of the TISZA Party’s commitments to the Hungarian people: anti-corruption measures, Hungary’s accession to the European Public Prosecutor’s Office, and the restoration of the independence and freedom of the judiciary, the press, and higher education. We intend to fully implement these commitments once in government, just as we will fulfill our promise to bring home the EU funds that belong to the Hungarian people. Following this, a new round of technical talks continued, featuring the highest level of professional representation from the incoming Hungarian government. These were crucial discussions — the first steps in a complex but urgent process. There is full agreement on one point: real work must begin so that the EU funds due to the Hungarian people can finally be released to Hungary. The consequences of the outgoing government’s mistakes will not disappear overnight. But we are not looking for excuses — we are looking for solutions. We have taken the first steps in the right direction. As planned, my third trip after taking the oath as Prime Minister will be to Brussels. There, I will conclude a comprehensive agreement with EU institutions and Member State leaders, ensuring that the Hungarian people and businesses access the EU funds they are entitled to as soon as possible. On April 12, the Hungarian people made a clear and decisive choice: Hungary’s place is in Europe. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix RT @magyarpeterMP：在过去两天里，我们在布达佩斯与欧盟委员会领导人举行了高层会谈。在这一轮会谈中，我明确表示，TISZA政府正以史无前例的合法性开始工作，同时也肩负着强烈的责任感。我强调，匈牙利人民的决定为匈牙利和欧洲都带来了巨大的机遇。我坚定地表示，数十亿欧元的欧盟资金理应属于匈牙利和匈牙利人民。没有这些资金，就不可能启动匈牙利经济。欧盟资金不是慈善，而是匈牙利人为欧盟所做贡献以及匈牙利为欧洲所做工作的公平回报。在谈判开始时，我向我们的合作伙伴通报了TISZA党对匈牙利人民的承诺：反腐败措施、匈牙利加入欧洲检察官办公室，以及恢复司法、新闻和高等教育的独立与自由。我们打算在执政后全面落实这些承诺，就像我们将履行带回属于匈牙利人民的欧盟资金的承诺一样。此后，新一轮技术会谈继续进行，由即将上任的匈牙利政府最高级别的专业代表参加。这些是至关重要的讨论——这是复杂但紧迫进程的第一步。双方在一点上完全达成一致：必须开始真正的工作，以便应付给匈牙利人民的欧盟资金最终能发放给匈牙利。前任政府错误造成的后果不会在一夜之间消失。但我们不是在寻找借口——我们是在寻找解决方案。我们已经朝着正确的方向迈出了第一步。按照计划，我在宣誓就任总理后的第三次出访将是布鲁塞尔。在那里，我将与欧盟机构和成员国领导人达成一项全面协议，确保匈牙利人民和企业尽快获得他们有权享有的欧盟资金。4月12日，匈牙利人民做出了明确而果断的选择：匈牙利属于欧洲。推文

text: Open Source Intel Notice how the new yellow in Lebanon goes into the water IDF spokesman: The IDF publishes the area of the front line of defense where IDF forces operate in southern Lebanon to prevent a direct threat to the northern settlements These days, five divisions and forces of the navy are working in parallel south of the front line of defense in southern Lebanon, to destroy terrorist infrastructures of the Hezbollah terrorist organization in the area and to prevent a direct threat to the northern settlements. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 注意黎巴嫩的新黄色区域是如何进入水中的 以色列国防军发言人：以色列国防军公布了以色列国防军部队在黎巴嫩南部行动的防线区域，以防止对北部定居点的直接威胁。这些天，五个师和海军部队正在黎巴嫩南部防线以南并行工作，以摧毁该地区真主党恐怖组织的恐怖基础设施，并防止对北部定居点的直接威胁。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The United States may launch a second, more intense phase of military operations against Iran in the coming days: 📌 “We are offering them (the Iranians) a very fair and reasonable deal, and I hope they accept it. Because if they don’t, the United States will destroy all of Iran’s power plants and every bridge. The ‘good guy’ game is over! They will fall quickly and easily. If they refuse the deal, it will be an honor for me to do what must be done — what other presidents should have done over the past 47 years. It’s time to end Iran’s killing machine!” 📌 “Yesterday, Iran decided to open fire in the Strait of Hormuz — a complete violation of our ceasefire agreement! They targeted a French vessel and a UK cargo ship. Not a good move, right? My representatives are heading to Islamabad, Pakistan — they’ll be there tomorrow evening for negotiations. Iran also announced it is closing the Strait, which is ironic since our blockade already shut it down. They’re actually helping us without realizing it and are losing about $500 million a day because of it. The United States is losing nothing. On the contrary, many ships are now heading toward the U.S. — to Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska — to pick up cargo. That’s thanks to Iran’s IRGC, which always wants to play ‘tough guys’!” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：#突发 ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国可能在未来几天对伊朗发动第二阶段更猛烈的军事行动：📌 “我们正在向他们（伊朗人）提供一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们接受。因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗所有的发电厂和每一座桥梁。‘好人’游戏结束了！他们会很快且轻易地倒下。如果他们拒绝该协议，能做必须做的事——即过去47年来其他总统本应做的事——对我来说将是一种荣幸。是时候终结伊朗的杀戮机器了！” 📌 “昨天，伊朗决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！他们瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘英国货船。这不是一个好举动，对吧？我的代表们正在前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的路上——他们明天晚上会到达那里进行谈判。伊朗还宣布关闭海峡，这很讽刺，因为我们的封锁已经关闭了它。他们实际上是在不知不觉中帮助我们，并因此每天损失约5亿美元。美国什么也没损失。相反，许多船只现在正驶向美国——前往德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加——去装载货物。这要归功于伊朗的伊斯兰革命卫队，他们总是想扮演‘硬汉’！” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump says Vice President JD Vance will not head the U.S. diplomatic delegation to Islamabad due to security concerns. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045864248429928696/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统表示，由于安全考虑，副总统JD·万斯将不会率领美国外交代表团前往伊斯兰堡。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045864248429928696/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Senior U.S. official now tells ABC News that Vice President Vance is going to Islamabad and will be leading the U.S. delegation for talks with Iran. According to ABC News, U.S. Vice President JD Vance will not be leading the diplomatic delegation to Islamabad, despite reports from Axios and several other outlets, with President Trump telling Jonathan Karl that the issue is security, the Secret Service couldn’t do it on 24 hours notice. “It’s only because of security. JD’s great.” - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 一位美国高级官员现在告诉美国广播公司新闻（ABC News），副总统万斯正在前往伊斯兰堡，并将率领美国代表团与伊朗进行会谈。据美国广播公司新闻报道，尽管有Axios和其他几家媒体的报道，美国副总统JD·万斯将不会率领外交代表团前往伊斯兰堡，特朗普总统告诉乔纳森·卡尔，问题在于安全，特勤局无法在24小时通知内完成任务。“这只是因为安全原因。JD很棒。” - OSINTdefender 推文

text: ELINT News RT @ytirawi : Lebanon | An Israeli soldier smashing the head of a Jesus Christ statue during operations in southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/ytirawi/status/2045851392527458672/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @ytirawi：黎巴嫩 | 一名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部行动期间砸碎了一尊耶稣基督雕像的头部。https://twitter.com/ytirawi/status/2045851392527458672/photo/1 推文

JD’s great.” tweet

text: Open Source Intel Argentine President Javier Milei prayed at the Western Wall in Jerusalem's Old City, accompanied by Ambassador Axel Wahnish. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045862688429887522/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱在耶路撒冷老城的西墙祈祷，大使阿克塞尔·瓦尼什陪同。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045862688429887522/video/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 What's happening with the US Navy fleet? 📝 The situation around the Strait of Hormuz remains tense — passage is intermittent, incidents already occur, and stable control exists only in Trump's statements. 🔻 Against this backdrop, the buildup of the US Navy grouping is telling: ➡️ As of yesterday, the region hosts two aircraft carriers and over a dozen destroyers . The Mediterranean Sea hosts several more ships for air cover of Israel. ➡️ In the Red Sea , a carrier strike group led by the "Gerald Ford" operates with three destroyers. On one hand, this also covers Israel, but on the other — it's a strike group in case the Houthis enter the war and close the Bab al-Mandab Strait. ➡️ The bulk of forces, meanwhile, concentrate further south — in the Arabian Sea and Indian Ocean . The "Abraham Lincoln" is deployed there with several destroyers off Iran's coast. ➡️ Another carrier strike group led by the "George Bush" is also heading to the region, moving through southern Africa with escort ships, and they are expected to arrive on April 21. 🖍 In fact, this amounts to not just containment, but tight blockade of three zones at once — the Mediterranean Sea, Red Sea, and Arabian Sea, which is clearly done for a reason. ❗️ Against this backdrop, talk of "de-escalation" looks, to put it mildly, strange — the grouping is not being reduced but expanded to greater numbers, so the Iranians clearly should be ready for new strikes in the coming days. High-resolution map #Iran #USA ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版：📝 美国海军舰队发生了什么？📝 霍尔木兹海峡周围的局势依然紧张——通行断断续续，事件已经发生，稳定的控制仅存在于特朗普的声明中。🔻 在此背景下，美国海军编队的集结说明了问题：➡️ 截至昨天，该地区拥有两艘航空母舰和十几艘驱逐舰。地中海还有几艘船只用于以色列的空中掩护。➡️ 在红海，以“杰拉尔德·福特”号为首的航母打击群带着三艘驱逐舰在行动。一方面，这也覆盖了以色列，但另一方面——如果胡塞武装参战并关闭曼德海峡，这是一个打击群。➡️ 与此同时，大部分兵力集中在更南边——阿拉伯海和印度洋。 “亚伯拉罕·林肯”号部署在那里，伊朗海岸外有几艘驱逐舰。➡️ 另一个以“乔治·布什”号为首的航母打击群也正在前往该地区，带着护航舰艇穿越南非，预计将于4月21日抵达。🖍 事实上，这不仅是遏制，而是对三个区域——地中海、红海和阿拉伯海的严密封锁，这显然是有原因的。❗️ 在此背景下，“降级”的说法往好里说显得很奇怪——编队并没有减少，而是扩大到了更大的数量，所以伊朗人显然应该为未来几天的新的打击做好准备。高分辨率地图 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 支持我们 原消息

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Tasnim: Iran currently has no decision to send a negotiating delegation, stating that no talks will take place as long as a U.S. naval blockade remains in effect. Indirect exchanges between Tehran and Washington have continued through Pakistani intermediaries following the collapse of the first round of negotiations. Iranian officials reiterated that the existence of the blockade is a key obstacle, stressing that negotiations cannot proceed under current conditions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆：伊朗目前没有派遣谈判代表团的决定，称只要美国的海上封锁仍然有效，就不会进行任何会谈。在第一轮谈判破裂后，德黑兰和华盛顿通过巴基斯坦中间人进行了间接交流。伊朗官员重申，封锁的存在是一个关键障碍，并强调在当前条件下谈判无法进行。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇦 Two men opened fire in the middle of a street in Chernigov: there are victims, local media reports. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇦 One of the Chernigov shooters was detained 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇳 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ABC: U.S. Ambassador to the UN Waltz reports that U.S. Vice President Vance will lead the negotiation delegation to Islamabad. However, U.S. President Trump denied that Vance will lead the delegation, citing security reasons. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇳 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ABC：美国驻联合国大使沃尔兹报告称，美国副总统万斯将率领谈判代表团前往伊斯兰堡。然而，美国总统特朗普以安全为由否认了万斯将率领代表团的消息。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Two men opened fire in the middle of a street in Chernigov: there are victims, local media reports. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 两名男子在切尔尼戈夫街头开火：据当地媒体报道，有人员伤亡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iran won’t send negotiators or hold talks with the U.S. as long as Trump’s naval blockade remains. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: 只要特朗普的海上封锁持续存在，伊朗就不会派遣谈判代表或与美国进行会谈。来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 Trump woke up and posted that his representatives are going to Islamabad 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 Iran has no plans to send a negotiating delegation. No talks while the naval blockade stands. According to Tasnim News Agency, message exchanges between Iran and the US via Pakistani intermediary have continued in recent days, following the conclusion of the first round of negotiations. These exchanges are a continuation of the same process that played out during the first round, a process that ultimately failed due to American overreach and excessive demands. The Iranian team has made clear: as long as Trump's naval blockade declaration remains in place, there will be no negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 特朗普醒来后发帖称，他的代表将前往伊斯兰堡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 伊朗没有派遣谈判代表团的计划。在海上封锁持续期间，不会进行任何会谈。据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，继第一轮谈判结束后，伊朗和美国近日通过巴基斯坦中间人继续进行了信息交流。这些交流是第一轮谈判期间所经历过程的延续，该过程最终因美国的越权和过分要求而失败。伊朗团队已明确表示：只要特朗普的海上封锁声明仍然有效，就不会进行任何谈判。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel An IDF tank moves through the destroyed streets of the Hezbollah stronghold and strategic town of Bint Jbeil, Lebanon https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045862198879174951/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一辆以色列国防军坦克穿过黎巴嫩真主党据点和战略城镇宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）被摧毁的街道 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045862198879174951/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @jonkarl : NEW - @USAmbUN Mike Waltz tells me JD Vance will lead the American delegation to Islamabad for talks with Iran - @ThisWeekABC tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @jonkarl : 最新消息 - @USAmbUN 迈克·沃尔兹（Mike Waltz）告诉我，JD·万斯（JD Vance）将率领美国代表团前往伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行会谈 - @ThisWeekABC 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Vice President JD Vance will lead a delegation, which will once again include Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and President Trump’s son-in-law Jared Kushner, for another round of direct peace talks with Iran in Islamabad, Pakistan on Monday, before the current two-week ceasefire is scheduled to end Tuesday, two U.S. officials tell Axios. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 两名美国官员告诉 Axios，美国副总统 JD·万斯将率领一个代表团，再次包括特使史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和特朗普总统的女婿贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner），于周一在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行新一轮直接和平谈判，此时距离目前为期两周的停火协议预定于周二结束还有不到一天的时间。 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz US Vice President Vance, Witkoff and Kushner will travel to Pakistan for talks with Iran tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 美国副总统万斯、威特科夫和库什纳将前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行会谈 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Trump on Iran: We're offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don't, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! President Trump: “Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz - A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many of them were aimed at a French Ship, and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. That wasn't nice, was it? My Representatives are going to Islamabad, Pakistan - They will be there tomorrow evening, for Negotiations. Iran recently announced that they were closing the Strait, which is strange, because our BLOCKADE has already closed it. They're helping us without knowing, and they are the ones that lose with the closed passage, $500 Million Dollars a day! The United States loses nothing. In fact, many Ships are headed, right now, to the U.S., Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to load up, compliments of the IRC, always wanting to be "the tough guy!" We're offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don't, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! They'll come down fast, they'll come down easy and, if they don't take the DEAL, it will be my Honor to do what has to be done, which should have been done to Iran, by other Presidents, for the last 47 years. IT'S TIME FOR THE IRAN KILLING MACHINE TO END! President DONALD J. TRUMP” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 特朗普谈伊朗：我们正在提供一份非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们能接受，因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！特朗普总统：“伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！其中许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。这可不友好，不是吗？我的代表们正前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡——他们明天晚上会到达那里进行谈判。伊朗最近宣布他们要关闭海峡，这很奇怪，因为我们的封锁已经关闭了它。他们是在不知情的情况下帮助我们，而他们才是因通道关闭而蒙受损失的一方，每天损失5亿美元！美国什么也没损失。事实上，许多船只现在正前往美国、德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加州装货，这多亏了伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRC），他们总是想当‘硬汉’！我们正在提供一份非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们能接受，因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！它们会很快倒塌，很容易倒塌，如果他们不接受这份协议，我有幸去做必须做的事情，这本应在过去47年里由其他总统对伊朗做的事情。是时候结束伊朗的杀戮机器了！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel TRUMP: IT'S TIME FOR THE IRAN KILLING MACHINE TO END! President Trump: “Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz - A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many of them were aimed at a French Ship, and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. That wasn't nice, was it? My Representatives are going to Islamabad, Pakistan - They will be there tomorrow evening, for Negotiations. Iran recently announced that they were closing the Strait, which is strange, because our BLOCKADE has already closed it. They're helping us without knowing, and they are the ones that lose with the closed passage, $500 Million Dollars a day! The United States loses nothing. In fact, many Ships are headed, right now, to the U.S., Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to load up, compliments of the IRC, always wanting to be "the tough guy!" We're offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don't, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! They'll come down fast, they'll come down easy and, if they don't take the DEAL, it will be my Honor to do what has to be done, which should have been done to Iran, by other Presidents, for the last 47 years. IT'S TIME FOR THE IRAN KILLING MACHINE TO END! President DONALD J. TRUMP” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 特朗普：是时候结束伊朗的杀戮机器了！特朗普总统：“伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！其中许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。这可不友好，不是吗？我的代表们正前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡——他们明天晚上会到达那里进行谈判。伊朗最近宣布他们要关闭海峡，这很奇怪，因为我们的封锁已经关闭了它。他们是在不知情的情况下帮助我们，而他们才是因通道关闭而蒙受损失的一方，每天损失5亿美元！美国什么也没损失。事实上，许多船只现在正前往美国、德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加州装货，这多亏了伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRC），他们总是想当‘硬汉’！我们正在提供一份非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们能接受，因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！它们会很快倒塌，很容易倒塌，如果他们不接受这份协议，我有幸去做必须做的事情，这本应在过去47年里由其他总统对伊朗做的事情。是时候结束伊朗的杀戮机器了！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine has asked Turkey to set up a Zelensky Putin meeting with Erdogan and Trump possibly joining, Sybiha tells Ukrinform. He says Putin is hiding and Zelensky is ready. Zelensky is ready to meet Putin. Why is he hiding, Sybiha asked a Russian reporter pestering the Ukrainian delegation about talks. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045445031721308189/video/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 西比哈（Sybiha）告诉乌克兰国家通讯社（Ukrinform），乌克兰已要求土耳其安排泽连斯基与普京的会晤，埃尔多安和特朗普可能会参加。他说普京在躲藏，而泽连斯基已经准备好了。泽连斯基准备好会见普京。西比哈在回答一名纠缠乌克兰代表团谈话问题的俄罗斯记者时反问：他为什么要躲藏？ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045445031721308189/video/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: WarTranslated With spring here, Russian occupiers tried to open motorcycle season, but it obviously didn't go as planned. Ukrainian forces in Zaporizhzhia stopped an assault using motorcycles and Ural trucks. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045860485350690886/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 春天到了，俄罗斯占领者试图开启摩托车季，但显然没有按计划进行。乌克兰军队在扎波罗热使用摩托车和乌拉尔卡车阻止了一次袭击。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045860485350690886/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump states that his representatives will be leaving soon for Islamabad, Pakistan, to attend the second round of peace negotiations with Iran, expected to take place Monday evening, adding that, “We're offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don't, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! They'll come down fast, they'll come down easy and, if they don't take the DEAL, it will be my Honor to do what has to be done, which should have been done to Iran, by other Presidents, for the last 47 years.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，他的代表们即将启程前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，参加与伊朗的第二轮和平谈判，预计将于周一晚上举行，并补充说：“我们正在提供一份非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们能接受，因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！它们会很快倒塌，很容易倒塌，如果他们不接受这份协议，我有幸去做必须做的事情，这本应在过去47年里由其他总统对伊朗做的事情。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump to ABC after Iran's "serious violation" of the ceasefire: "It will happen. One way or another. The nice way or the hard way. It's going to happen. You can QUOTE ME." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045858745679266020/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普在伊朗“严重违反”停火协议后对美国广播公司（ABC）表示：“这将会发生。无论以哪种方式。以友好的方式或强硬的方式。它终将发生。你可以引用我的话。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045858745679266020/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW: U.S. Ambassador to the UN to ABC: All options are on the table regarding Iran tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯：美国驻联合国大使对美国广播公司（ABC）表示：关于伊朗，所有选项都在桌面上 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC Aerospace Force Commander Gen. Mousavi: During the ceasefire, Iran has been upgrading & replenishing its missile & drone capabilities faster than before the war, while the enemy has struggled to rebuild its stockpiles & must import munitions gradually from abroad. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045856792840675454/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队指挥官穆萨维将军：在停火期间，伊朗升级和补充导弹及无人机能力的速度比战前更快，而敌人则在努力重建库存，且必须逐渐从国外进口弹药。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045856792840675454/video/1 推文

text: Faytuks News RT @jonkarl : President Trump just told me Vance will not be going to Islamabad. He said the issue is security — the Secret Service couldn’t do it on 24 hours notice. “It’s only because of security,” he told me. “JD’s great.” NEW - @USAmbUN Mike Waltz tells me JD Vance will lead the American delegation to Islamabad for talks with Iran - @ThisWeekABC - Jonathan Karl tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转推 @jonkarl : 特朗普总统刚刚告诉我，万斯不会去伊斯兰堡。他说问题在于安全——特勤局无法在24小时通知内完成任务。“这只是因为安全原因，”他告诉我。“JD很棒。” 最新消息 - @USAmbUN 迈克·沃尔兹告诉我，JD·万斯将率领美国代表团前往伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行会谈 - @ThisWeekABC - 乔纳森·卡尔（Jonathan Karl）推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 President Trump told Fox News that Iran is at its “last chance” to make a deal, saying he will not repeat what he called Obama’s mistakes and warning that if Tehran refuses, “the whole country is getting blown up.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 特朗普总统告诉福克斯新闻，伊朗正处于达成协议的“最后机会”，称他不会重复他所谓的奥巴马的错误，并警告说如果德黑兰拒绝，“整个国家都将被炸毁。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Syria arrested a Hezbollah-linked terror cell in Quneitra that planned to launch rockets at Israel from Syrian territory. Two suspects detained, several rockets seized. The Syrian Interior Ministry said the cell aimed to "destabilize the country." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045855954378375343/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 叙利亚在库奈特拉逮捕了一个与真主党有关的恐怖小组，该小组计划从叙利亚领土向以色列发射火箭弹。两名嫌疑人被拘留，缴获了几枚火箭弹。叙利亚内政部表示，该小组旨在“破坏国家稳定”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045855954378375343/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇱 Jerusalem District Court cancels Netanyahu's corruption trial testimony this week at his request, citing "security and diplomatic" reasons, over the State Attorney's Office's objection. Another witness testifies tomorrow; Tuesday's hearing is scrapped. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 耶路撒冷地方法院应内塔尼亚胡本人的请求，取消了他本周的腐败案证词，理由是“安全和外交”原因，尽管国家检察官办公室对此表示反对。另一名证人将于明天作证；周二的听证会已被取消。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 Trump woke up and posted that his representatives are going to Islamabad 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 JD Vance will not fly to Islamabad due to security reasons, Trump told an ABC journalist. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 特朗普醒来后发帖称，他的代表将前往伊斯兰堡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐款 | 广告” 🇺🇸 特朗普告诉美国广播公司（ABC）记者，JD·万斯出于安全原因将不会飞往伊斯兰堡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 US Regime's Secretary of Energy Chris Wright considers Trump's threats to blow up Iranian civilian infrastructure "maximum leverage" — not a war crime. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国政权能源部长克里斯·赖特认为，特朗普威胁要炸毁伊朗民用基础设施是“最大杠杆”——而非战争罪。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
